sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top') ) A

SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME, CLOSED_DAY, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE, date_format(CONF_SET_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CONF_SET_DATE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime#, CLOSED_DAY = #closedDay#, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL = #attitudeModAppl#, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE = #closedDateAttitude#, CONF_SET_DATE = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, TBL_USERMASTER.title AS usertitle, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname AS userName, TBL_USERMASTER.description AS deptName, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, '0', '1') AS compareTime FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE)
TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, '0', '1') = #searchCompareValue#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname
ORDER BY TBL_USERMASTER.displayname
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, '0', '1') = #searchCompareValue#

SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
PARENT_ID = 'A05'
TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(cast(substring(TYPE_ID,2) as unsigned)) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2#, IMG_PATH = #imgPath# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE (TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, IMG_PATH, PARENT_ID, FORM_ID) VALUES (#typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, #imgPath#, 'A05', (SELECT A.FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TYPE_ID = 'A11'))
sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, TBL_USERMASTER.title AS usertitle, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname AS userName, TBL_USERMASTER.description AS deptName, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, '0', '1') AS compareTime FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #selectUserId#

SELECT DISPLAYNAME AS USER_NAME, CN AS USER_ID, TITLE AS JIKWI, MAIL AS MAIL, DESCRIPTION AS DEPT_NAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
AND $key$ LIKE concat('%',#value#,'%')
AND $key$ = #value#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME, COMPANY_ID, DEPT_ID) SELECT #userId# as USER_ID, #tenantId# as TENANT_ID, #workStartTime# as WORK_STARTTIME, #workEndTime# as WORK_ENDTIME, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANY_ID, DEPARTMENT as DEPT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT D.CN AS ID, IF(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1=NULL
OR D.CN=#companyId#
,'##',D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) AS PARENT, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, D.DISPLAYNAME AS TEXT, CASE D.CN WHEN D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 THEN 'COMP' ELSE 'DEPT' END AS ISCOMP, CASE D.CN WHEN U.DEPARTMENT THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS MYDEPT FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.extensionattribute2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 1, 10) AS startdate, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12) AS starttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 1, 10),'') AS enddate, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12),'') AS endtime, A.modappl, A.ip, A.date_type AS datetype, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name AS typename, C.displayname AS username, C.description AS deptname, C.title AS usertitle FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
C.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
C.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, C.displayname
ORDER BY C.displayname
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
C.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
C.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')

SELECT A.USER_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.AUTH_DEPT_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNAME, B.TITLE AS USERTITLE, B.DESCRIPTION AS USERDAPTNAME, group_concat(C.DISPLAYNAME order by 1) AS AUTHDEPTNAME FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON (A.USER_ID = B.CN) INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON (A.AUTH_DEPT_ID = C.CN) WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.USER_ID ORDER BY USERNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #selectUserId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPT_NAME, D.CN AS DEPT_ID, 'no' AS MINE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A ON (D.CN = A.AUTH_DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = 1 UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPT_NAME, D.CN AS DEPT_ID, 'yes' AS MINE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON (D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID) WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DEPT_NAME
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, AUTH_DEPT_ID) VALUES (#selectUserId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #deptId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT ifnull(SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(IFNULL(A.END_DATE, A.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(A.TYPE_ID), 0) AS COUNT, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME, #months# AS STAT_MONTH FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A RIGHT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.WRITER_ID = #userId# AND ( (A.START_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.START_DATE <= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.START_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) ) GROUP BY A.TYPE_ID
